task_objective: Prove that Project Control Cockpit can create a bounded worker directive, hand it to Claude Code through a local file bridge, receive a worker result, verify the result, and update or reject state based on the verdict.
completion_criteria: A worker directive is created at .cockpit/handoff/worker-directive.md.
The directive contains objective, allowed scope, forbidden scope, completion criteria, and required evidence.
A worker result can be placed at .cockpit/result/worker-result.md.
A verification result can be placed at .cockpit/result/verification-result.json.
State update is allowed only when verification verdict is PASS.

allowed: Create or update V1 proof files.
Use .cockpit/ state, handoff, result, and logs folders.
Create minimal scripts only if required for the proof.
forbidden: Do not build a full desktop UI.
Do not add paid API dependencies.
Do not build broad model orchestration.
Do not add CCB integration in V1.

required_evidence: Result of commands run, if any.
Confirmation that forbidden scope was not touched.
next_action: Generate the first worker directive for Claude Code.
